title: Feedstock liquefier replacement in additive manufacturing
abstract: A printhead assembly comprising connection means for connecting to a positioning system of an AM system, a feedstock liquefying unit, the feedstock liquefying unit comprising a nozzle for depositing liquefied AM feedstock onto at least one of a build plate and an object to be created. The feedstock liquefying unit has a supply opening and a supply channel from the supply opening to the nozzle. The printhead assembly further comprises heat exchanging means attached to the printhead assembly, wherein the heat exchanging means are configured and arranged to establish a releasable clamping connection with the feedstock liquefying unit to accommodate the feedstock liquefying unit in the printhead assembly. The heat exchanging means are actuatable for bringing the heat exchanging means to an open state, and for bringing the heat exchanging means to a closed state. A system for additive manufacturing, comprising a build plate, and a positioning system associated with at least one of the printhead assembly and the build plate, a feedstock liquefying unit storage, a controller arranged for controlling the positioning system for replacing the feedstock liquefying unit.
claims:
Claims 1. Printhead assembly (102) for a system (100) for additive manufacturing (AM), wherein the printhead assembly (102) comprises √Ç¬∑ connection means for connecting the printhead assembly to a positioning system of an AM system (100); √¢¬Ä¬¢ heat exchanging means (106, 106√¢¬Ä¬ô, 106√¢¬Ä¬ù) attached to the printhead assembly (102), wherein the heat exchanging means are configured and arranged to establish a releasable clamping connection with a feedstock liquefying unit (107) that is configured to liquefy AM feedstock to accommodate the feedstock liquefying unit (107) in the printhead assembly (102); wherein √¢¬Ä¬¢ the heat exchanging means (106, 106√¢¬Ä¬ô, 106√¢¬Ä¬ù) are actuatable for bringing the heat exchanging means (106, 106√¢¬Ä¬ô, 106√¢¬Ä¬ù) to an open state, to allow at least one of disposal of the feedstock liquefying unit (107) and acquisition of a replacement feedstock liquefying unit, and for bringing the heat exchanging means (106, 106√¢¬Ä¬ô, 106√¢¬Ä¬ù) to a closed state, to hold the feedstock liquefying unit (107). 2. Printhead assembly (102) according to claim 1 , wherein the heat exchanging means (106, 106√¢¬Ä¬ô, 106√¢¬Ä¬ù) comprises a first heat exchanging section (201 a) and at least one of a second heat exchanging section (201 b) and a support structure, wherein the support structure is associated with the printhead assembly, wherein √Ç¬∑ the first heat exchanging section (201a) and at least one of the second heat exchanging section (201 b) and the support structure are movable relative to one another; and wherein √¢¬Ä¬¢ at least one of the first heat exchanging section (201 a), the second heat exchanging section (201 b) and the support structure is actuatable to bring the heat exchanging means (106, 106√¢¬Ä¬ô, 106√¢¬Ä¬ù) to said open state, and wherein √¢¬Ä¬¢ at least one of the first heat exchanging section (201 a), the second heat exchanging section (201 b) and the support structure is actuatable to bring the heat exchanging means (106, 106√¢¬Ä¬ô, 106√¢¬Ä¬ù) to said closed state. 3. Printhead assembly (102) according to claim 2, wherein at least one of the first heat exchanging section (201 a, 201 b), the second heat exchanging section and the support structure is associated with the printhead assembly (102) using a pivotal hinge (202). 4. Printhead assembly (102) according to claim 2 or claim 3, wherein at least one of the first heat exchanging section (201a, 201 b), the second heat exchanging section and the support structure is associated with the printhead assembly (102) using a slidable arrangement. 5. Printhead assembly (102) according to any one of the claims 2 - 4, wherein the printhead assembly (102) further comprises a reference element (302) for providing a reference position to the at least one first heat exchanging section (201a). 6. Printhead assembly (102) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the heat exchanging means (106, 106√¢¬Ä¬ô, 106√¢¬Ä¬ù) are provided with a recess (205) that is arranged to accommodate a feedstock liquefying unit (107), the heat exchanging means (106, 106√¢¬Ä¬ô, 106√¢¬Ä¬ù) being arranged to release and acquire the feedstock liquefying unit in at least one of a direction transverse to an axial center line of the recess (205), and in a direction parallel to the axial center line of the recess (205). 7. Printhead assembly (102) according to claim 6, wherein at least one of the first heat exchanging section (201a) and the second heat exchanging section (201 b) and the support structure is provided with at least one heat conductive element (204a). 8. Printhead assembly (102) according to claim 7, wherein said at least one heat conductive element (204a) has a recessed shape corresponding to an outer circumference of the feedstock liquefying unit (107) for close fittingly accommodating the feedstock liquefying unit (107). 9. Printhead assembly according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein at least one of the first heat exchanging section (201a) and the second heat exchanging section (201 b) and the support structure is provided with first actuating means, and wherein the first actuating means are arranged to 

 cooperate with a second actuating means of a feedstock liquefying unit storage and a positioning system of an AM system. 10. Printhead assembly according to any one of the preceding claims, further comprising a feedstock liquefying unit (107), wherein said feedstock liquefying unit (107) comprises a nozzle (401 ) for depositing liquefied AM feedstock onto at least one of a build plate and an object to be created (108), the feedstock liquefying unit having a supply opening and a supply channel from the supply opening to the nozzle (401 ). 1 1. Printhead assembly (102) according to claim 10, wherein the feedstock liquefying unit (107) comprises a thermally conductive tube (402) which is attached to the nozzle (401 ), wherein the supply channel is accommodated within the thermally conductive tube (402), and the supply opening is formed by an end part of the thermally conductive tube (402) that is arranged opposite of the nozzle (401 ). 12. Printhead assembly (102) according to claim 1 1 , wherein the thermally conductive tube (402) is provided with at least one concentric heat conductive section (403). 13. System (100) for additive manufacturing (AM), comprising √¢¬Ä¬¢ a build plate (104) for positioning an object (108) to be created; √¢¬Ä¬¢ at least one printhead assembly (102) according to any one of the preceding claims; √¢¬Ä¬¢ a feedstock liquefying unit (107) accommodated in said at least one printhead assembly (102); √¢¬Ä¬¢ feedstock supply means (103), arranged for feeding the feedstock into the feedstock liquefying unit (107); √¢¬Ä¬¢ a positioning system (101 ) associated with at least one of the printhead assembly (102) and the build plate (104), arranged for relative spatial positioning of the printhead assembly (102) and the build plate (104); √¢¬Ä¬¢ a feedstock liquefying unit storage (105), comprising holding means (602a, 602b) for accommodating at least one feedstock liquefying unit (107); √¢¬Ä¬¢ a controller arranged for 

 √¢¬Ä¬¢ controlling the positioning system (101 ) for disposing the feedstock liquefying unit (107) in a feedstock liquefying unit storage (105); and √¢¬Ä¬¢ controlling the positioning system (101 ) for acquiring a replacement feedstock liquefying unit from the feedstock liquefying unit storage (105). 14. System (100) according to claim 13, wherein √¢¬Ä¬¢ the feedstock liquefying unit storage (105) is provided with first actuating means (604); √¢¬Ä¬¢ at least one of the first heat exchanging section (201a, 201 b), the second heat exchanging section and the support structure is provided with second actuating means (203a, 203b); and wherein √¢¬Ä¬¢ the first actuating means (604) being arranged to cooperate with the second actuating means (203a, 203b). 15. System (100) according to claim 13 or claim 14, wherein the feedstock liquefying unit storage (105) is provided with at least one docking position (A) for accommodating the feedstock liquefying unit (107). 16. System according to any one of the claims 13 - 15, wherein the controller that is arranged to control the positioning system (101 ) for disposing the feedstock liquefying unit (107) in the feedstock liquefying unit storage (105) is configured to: √Ç¬∑ control the positioning system (101 ) for moving the printhead (102) assembly to an unoccupied docking position (A); √¢¬Ä¬¢ enable engagement of the second actuating means (203a, 203b) and the first actuating means (604) to move the heat exchanging means (106) to the open state; and √Ç¬∑ dispose the feedstock liquefying unit (107) in the unoccupied docking position (A). 17. System (100) according to claim 16, wherein the controller that is arranged to control the positioning system (101 ) for acquiring a replacement feedstock liquefying unit from the feedstock liquefying unit storage (105) is configured to: 

 √¢¬Ä¬¢ control the positioning system (101 ) for moving the printhead (102) to an occupied docking position (C); √¢¬Ä¬¢ enable engagement of the second actuating means (203a, 203b) and the first actuating means (604) to move the heat exchanging means (106) to the open state, and envelop the replacement feedstock liquefying unit in the occupied docking position (C); √¢¬Ä¬¢ control the positioning system (101 ) for retracting the printhead (102) from the occupied docking position (C); and √¢¬Ä¬¢ before retracting the printhead from the occupied docking position (C), enable engagement of the second actuating means (203a, 203b) and the first actuating means (604) to move the heat exchanging means (106) to the closed state. 18. System (100) according to any one of the claims 13 - 17, wherein the feedstock supply means (103) is connected to the supply opening of the feedstock liquefying unit (107). 19. System (100) according to any one of the claims 13 - 17, wherein the feedstock supply means (103) is connected to the printhead assembly and wherein the feedstock supply means (103) further comprise a detachable passage for detachably connecting the feedstock supply means (103) to the feedstock liquefying unit.
